table_columns.name: sequence_number
table_columns.description: Index of the input sequence among all input sequences.

table_columns.name: start
table_columns.description: Start position (1-based index) of the peptide within the full input sequence.

table_columns.name: end
table_columns.description: End position (1-based index) of the peptide within the full input sequence.

table_columns.name: allele
table_columns.description: MHC allele used in the prediction

table_columns.name: peptide_index
table_columns.description: Serial number of the peptide among all peptides

table_columns.name: median_percentile
table_columns.description: The median percentile rank of binding/elution predictions was calculated by using the adjusted percentiles when available, otherwise the standard percentiles

table_columns.name: netmhciipan_el_core
table_columns.description: Always 9 amino acids long sequence. It's a construction used for sequence alignment and identification of binding anchors.

table_columns.name: netmhciipan_el_score
table_columns.description: binding/elution prediction score which indicates binding affinity

table_columns.name: netmhciipan_el_percentile
table_columns.description: The percentile rank generated by comparing the peptide's IC50/score against those of a set of random peptides from SWISSPROT database

table_columns.name: binding.netmhciipan_el.percentile.hla-drb1*11:01
table_columns.description: The percentile rank generated by comparing the peptide's IC50/score against those of a set of random peptides from SWISSPROT database

table_columns.name: overall_median_percentile
table_columns.description: The overall median percentile rank for each peptide across methods and alleles was calculated by using the adjusted percentiles when available, otherwise the standard percentiles

table_columns.name: binding.median_percentile.hla-drb1*11:01
table_columns.description: The median percentile rank of binding/elution predictions by alleles was calculated by using the adjusted percentiles when available, otherwise the standard percentiles

table_columns.name: global_median_percentile
table_columns.description: The median of the median binding percentiles by allele for each peptide
